h066324b6g1d97g4735gb818g6024dbdef407: I'm fed up with that bloody eye. Peep on someone else, you hear!
hc89b5457gb432g4d24g99ceg4dc9d86ab942: You see that eye wotsit floatin' about? Best hope it don't take a fancy to you...
hedeffbc9g62c8g4b72gab67g933d7861cbc6: ... unless you like playin' hide an' seek when yer tryin' to take a dump.
heba31ba1g18f0g4e27gaf6dg42a136f1e893: Eh? You dunno? Hah! A grunt like the rest of us, eh?
hf2496369ge767g4a2bg9710g0675f3ddea15: It's a floatin' eye, mate. Yer bosses at Moonrise enjoy spyin' on us.
hd94abc0bg7ccdg44eegb5dfgf12457c8b797: Load o' trollop. Jus' don't trust us to do what we do best - killin' things.
hbe07e50fg1e1ag455bg884bgf491c4bbe4ef: It's a floatin' eye, mate. What do you reckon? Bloody spyin' on us.
he7ae67a7ga18fg407dgaba5ga1df00a960b1: The bigwigs at Moonrise like to 'be involved', the drow says.
h5dabb956gf033g4085gb423ga54756a2ca88: It can look all it likes. I've got nothing to hide.
hff060035g4b9dg46bdg9c43ga3aadab18b4f: If that's how you get yer kicks, ain't no business o' mine.
h3d07e5d1gd7cfg4e58gaf6bg0090d2f51513: But when yer takin' a tinkle, be sure to wave, eh? The bigwigs at Moonrise love a good show.
hf4bcd077g4cfbg40e9gbab1g574b96062b9d: But when yer takin' a tinkle, or whatever you lot do with your bits, give it a wave, eh? The bigwigs at Moonrise love a good show.
he8d1a79ag3094g441bga9dfg3dacb700a841: Heh. It's a good thing my kind do not need to defecate.
h1dbef2ceg8da7g4df1gbebagbb89780dd54b: What? You must have some plug in ya! Ah, wait. You're some messer. Had me well fooled.
hce78319eg72edg4300g8b43g2d5387a3b87f: You seen that scryin' eye wotsit about? Handy, that.
h69fbfa5eg4a30g432cg8e2cg701a5d1a675e: You fancy me or somethin'? Leave off!
hc740ff80gfa11g4700gb83eg11452523c002: Any questions? Minthara is the one yer after.
h9082a43fgd610g452ag9630gb3e30b974e13: Whatcha staring at? Move along, ugly.
